toasts.demoFinished: The demo is over. Returning to the home page.
toasts.editModeRequired: Switch to Edit mode to modify nodes.

shareDialog.title: This Structure Map is for demo only
shareDialog.description: In the full service, you can share your Structure Map by link and view it together with others. Start using Brify to create a share link for your own map.

notes.helper: You can jot down quick thoughts while reading important nodes.
notes.placeholder: Write down what comes to mind from this node.

items.text: The meal timing makes the daily fasting rhythm easy to follow at a glance.
A key takeaway is that he avoids OMAD to maintain weight, not because of hunger.

terms.autoAddedXylitol: Mentioned in the video as the sweetener added to coffee.
terms.customAdded: A custom term added in the demo view.
terms.helper: AI automatically extracts key terms to make the content easier to understand.

items.meaning: Used as a quality standard for animal-based foods in the video.
A sourcing standard for eggs and livestock that is emphasized throughout the routine.

expand.label: Expand / Collapse
expand.description: Use the + button to open child nodes

edit.title: Switch to Edit mode before editing
edit.description: You're currently in View mode. Switch to Edit mode at the top before changing nodes or structure.
edit.calloutDescription: Start here when you want to edit the map.

mouse.title: Move the map by right-dragging
mouse.description: When you're using a mouse, hold right click and drag to move around the map smoothly.
mouse.calloutDescription: Hold right click and drag the map.

trackpad.title: Use two fingers on a trackpad to move the map
trackpad.description: On a laptop trackpad, slide with two fingers to pan across the map naturally.
trackpad.calloutDescription: Use a two-finger gesture to move around.

context.title: Select a node, then right click
context.description: Select a node first, then right click to open a context menu with the available actions.
context.calloutDescription: The menu opens after selecting a node.

highlight.title: Use highlight to mark important parts
highlight.description: Click the middle icon to highlight a node. Mark important parts so they are much easier to revisit later.
highlight.calloutDescription: Highlight key parts while you read.

expand.title: Expand and collapse nodes to read more comfortably
expand.description: Click the + button inside the circle to reveal child content. You can collapse it again and follow only what you need, which makes the Structure Map much easier to read.
expand.calloutDescription: Click the + button to reveal child content.

terms.title: AI organizes difficult terms for you
terms.description: In the Terms tab on the left panel, AI can gather unfamiliar words from the content and explain them clearly.
terms.calloutDescription: AI finds difficult terms and organizes them for you.

shortcuts.title: It gets much easier once you remember the shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Once you remember the most useful shortcuts, working with a Structure Map becomes much faster. You can always open this again from More > Shortcuts.

edit.title: Editing is ready on mobile by default
edit.description: On mobile, the Structure Map opens in an editable state from the start.
edit.calloutDescription: You can start editing right away on mobile.

move.title: You can drag the map directly on mobile
move.description: On mobile, you do not need a separate move mode. Just drag with one finger on empty space or away from the node controls to pan the map.
move.calloutDescription: Try dragging with one finger to move the map.

select.title: Tap a node to select it, and long-press to open the edit menu
select.description: On mobile, a single tap selects a node. The small quick actions next to the node are available right away, and in Edit mode the bottom edit bar opens when you long-press.
select.calloutDescription: Tap a node to select it, then long-press when you want the edit menu.

highlight.title: Highlight important nodes as you read
highlight.description: When a node is selected, small quick-action buttons appear next to it. Use the highlight button there to mark important parts.
highlight.calloutDescription: Select a node, then tap the highlight button.

expand.title: Expand and collapse nodes to read more comfortably
expand.description: Tap the + button inside the circle to reveal child content. You can collapse it again and follow only what you need, which makes the Structure Map much easier to read.
expand.calloutDescription: Tap the + button to reveal child content.

panel.title: Open the left panel for more context
panel.description: Tap the left panel button to open the Info, Notes, and Terms tabs. While reading the Structure Map, you can quickly check whatever you need there.
panel.calloutDescription: This button opens the Info, Notes, and Terms tabs.

terms.title: AI organizes difficult terms for you
terms.description: In the Terms tab on the left panel, AI can gather unfamiliar words from the content and explain them clearly.
terms.calloutDescription: You can review difficult terms here.

ConfirmShareDialog.title: Publish before sharing
ConfirmShareDialog.description: Publish the current changes and generate a share link?

LeftPanel.title: Details
LeftPanel.termsIntro: AI automatically extracts key terms to help you understand the content.

notesBlock.annotationsHelper: Browse annotations attached to nodes and jump to that node with one click.
notesBlock.highlightsHelper: Browse highlighted nodes and jump to them with one click.

notes.helper: Write down what stands out to you.
notes.placeholder: Write a note… (Press Enter to add)

customInline.title: Explain only the terms you want
customInline.description: Separate terms with commas to explain only those terms.

picker.title: How would you like to get explanations?

auto.title: Explain all terms
auto.description: AI automatically extracts terms and summarizes the essentials.

TagEditDialog.title: Edit tags
TagEditDialog.description: Type a tag and press Enter to add it.

modeBadge.edit: Edit mode: you can edit/add nodes
modeBadge.view: View mode: focus on the flow

share.statusLoadFailed: We couldn't load the share status.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this structure map?
deleteConfirm.description: This action can’t be undone. Do you want to continue?

DiscardDraftDialog.description: Discard all draft changes and return to the last published version?

status.fetchError: We couldn't load the structure map.

modeBadge.view: View mode: focus on the flow

MetadataDialog.title: Content Details
MetadataDialog.subtitle: Title is required; everything else is optional.

fields.sourceQuestion: Is this the YouTube transcript you entered?
fields.title: Title

placeholders.title: e.g., Enter a content title
placeholders.description: Add notes, summary, or description for this structure map.

hints.youtubeUrl: If this is a YouTube URL, we can autofill title/channel/thumbnail.
hints.nonYoutubeUrl: If it's not a YouTube URL, please fill in the fields below.
hints.tags: Separate tags with commas to save them.

tags.enterHint: Type a tag and press Enter to add it.

thumbnail.uploadHint: Selected image will upload on save. (<=5MB, webp conversion)

MetadataDialog.footerHint: After entering a title and saving, you can manage it in your maps list.

errors.titleRequired: Title is required. Please enter a title.

MapMetadataEditDialog.title: Edit metadata
MapMetadataEditDialog.subtitle: Update the current Structure Map title, source, tags, and description directly.
MapMetadataEditDialog.footerHint: Saving will update this Structure Map metadata immediately.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by map title or tag

recent.emptyInterestTags: There are not enough tags collected from recent maps yet.

tagPanel.title: Tags
tagPanel.filterHint: Checking tags will instantly filter the map list below by those tags.

previewPanel.closedDescription: You can reopen it anytime for quick comparison.

notesTab.title: Maps with notes
notesTab.leftDescription: Quickly revisit only the maps that already have saved memos.
notesTab.rightDescription: Read the selected map's memo, annotations, and highlights in one place.
notesTab.searchPlaceholder: Search by map title or channel
notesTab.noSearchResults: No note maps match your search.
notesTab.empty: There are no maps with saved memos yet.

emptySections.annotations: No annotations attached to nodes yet.

termsTab.title: Maps with terms
termsTab.leftDescription: Quickly revisit only the maps that already have organized terms.
termsTab.rightDescription: Read the selected map's terms and explanations in one place.
termsTab.searchPlaceholder: Search by map title or channel
termsTab.noSearchResults: No term maps match your search.
termsTab.empty: There are no maps with organized terms yet.
termsTab.emptyTerms: This map doesn't have any organized terms yet.

comingSoon.notesTitle: The Notes tab is coming next.
comingSoon.notesDescription: In the next step, you'll be able to view only maps that contain notes and read memo, annotation, and highlight content for the selected map in one place.
comingSoon.termsTitle: The Terms tab is coming next.
comingSoon.termsDescription: In the next step, you'll be able to view only maps that contain terms and review term explanations for the selected map in one place.

previewEmpty.noMaps: You have not created any structure maps yet.
previewEmpty.noMapsInRange: No structure maps were created in the selected date range.
previewEmpty.selectFromList: Please select a map from the list.

toast.previewTurnsOffTagOrganize: Tag organize mode was turned off to open preview mode.
toast.tagOrganizeTurnsOffPreview: Preview mode was turned off when tag organize mode was enabled.
toast.tagOrganizeTurnsOffSelection: Selection mode was turned off when tag organize mode was enabled.
toast.selectionTurnsOffPreview: Preview mode was turned off when selection mode was enabled.

empty.noMapsForFilters: No structure maps match the selected filters.

deleteMap.title: Delete this structure map?
deleteMap.description: This cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

deleteSelected.title: Delete selected structure maps?
deleteSelected.description: Deleting selected maps cannot be undone.

deleteTag.title: Delete this tag?
deleteTag.descriptionSuffix: will be removed from all maps. Continue?
deleteTag.description: The selected tag will be removed from all maps. Continue?

mergeDialog.title: Merge maps
mergeDialog.description: Selected maps will be attached as children under a new root.
mergeDialog.validation: Enter a root title to continue merging.
mergeDialog.help: Selected maps will be placed in order under the root title you enter.
